message:
Update E2E workflow tests for list command JSON response format

The list command now returns a wrapped response object instead of a
bare array, providing additional metadata alongside the results:

Previous format (bare array):
  [{ id, title, description, category, ... }, ...]

New format (object with metadata):
  {
    prompts: [{ id, title, description, category, ... }, ...],
    count: <number>
  }

Updated test assertions:
- Step 2 "list all prompts": Access via response.prompts, verify count
- Step 2b "list with category filter": Same structure updates
- All affected tests now validate the count field matches array length

This structured format provides:
- Explicit result count without parsing the array
- Consistent pattern with search command response
- Room for future metadata (pagination, filters applied, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
